schedule.name: espn-world-cup-scoreboard
schedule.notes: JSON scoreboard endpoint for fixtures and results.

schedule.name: fifa-2026-fixtures
schedule.notes: Official tournament fixtures page; use as authoritative schedule fallback.

schedule.name: oddsportal-world-cup-schedule
schedule.notes: Schema.org SportsEvent fallback for schedule cross-checking.

team_form.name: espn-world-cup-scoreboard-form
team_form.notes: Recent event and result material for form extraction.

team_form.name: espn-world-cup-team-schedules
team_form.notes: Discovers World Cup team IDs from ESPN, fetches each team schedule, and extracts latest completed match form.

team_form.name: world-football-elo
team_form.notes: National team Elo ratings and match history context.

ranking.name: world-football-elo-ranking
ranking.notes: Independent Elo-style strength rating from World.tsv and en.teams.tsv.

injury.name: sportsmole-world-cup-injuries
injury.notes: Dedicated World Cup injury and suspension index; adapter follows article links and parses team Out/Doubtful/Suspended sections.

injury.name: transfermarkt-world-cup-2026-injuries
injury.notes: Secondary injury and suspension crawl target for cross-checking Sports Mole and news-feed availability signals.

injury.name: bbc-world-cup-football-injuries
injury.notes: Accessible news feed used for first-wave injury signal extraction.

injury.name: fifa-world-cup-news-injuries
injury.notes: Official news fallback for availability reports.

odds.name: oddsportal-world-cup
odds.notes: Market odds comparison source; dynamic rendering likely.

odds.name: betexplorer-world-cup
odds.notes: Secondary market comparison source with static decimal odds fragments.

odds.name: oddschecker-world-cup
odds.notes: Additional odds comparison website for cross-checking market price samples.

news_sentiment.name: bbc-world-cup-football
news_sentiment.notes: News sentiment and tactical narrative source.

player.name: espn-world-cup-rosters
player.notes: Discovers World Cup team IDs from ESPN, fetches each team roster JSON endpoint, and extracts player-level squad facts.

player.name: transfermarkt-world-cup-2026-squads
player.notes: Secondary squad/player-level crawl target for player dataset cross-checking.
